_meta.description: Lean process ontology — node types, relationships, classifications, RACI rules, and inference hints for ARCŌ and CORTEX.
_meta.note: This is the single source of truth for all process reasoning in MERIDIAN. Upgrade path: JSON schema → semantic ontology in V3+.

nodeTypes._description: All valid step types in a MERIDIAN process blueprint.

start.label: Start
start.description: Entry point of a process or sub-process.

end.label: End
end.description: Terminal point of a process or sub-process.

process.label: Process Step
process.description: A standard operational action or task.

control.label: Control
control.description: A step that prevents, detects, or corrects risk. Must have a defined owner.

ccp.label: Critical Control Point
ccp.description: A control step where failure has critical consequence. Threshold and corrective action are mandatory.

compliance.label: Compliance Step
compliance.description: A step driven by regulatory or internal compliance obligation.

decision.label: Decision
decision.description: A branching point with two or more defined outcomes.

system.label: System Step
system.description: An automated step performed by a system with no human action required.

handoff.label: Handoff
handoff.description: Transfer of responsibility from one role, team, or system to another.

raci._description: RACI role definitions and assignment rules.

R.label: Responsible
R.description: The person who does the work.

A.label: Accountable
A.description: The single owner who approves or signs off. One per step.

C.label: Consulted
C.description: Provides input before the step is completed.

I.label: Informed
I.description: Notified after the step is completed.

rules.note: Where R and A are the same person on a control step, flag as potential SoD risk.

control.label: Control
control.description: Step performs a risk control function.

compliance-internal.label: Internal Compliance
compliance-internal.description: Step fulfils an internal policy or procedural obligation.

compliance-regulatory.label: Regulatory Compliance
compliance-regulatory.description: Step fulfils an external regulatory or legal obligation.

reporting.label: Reporting
reporting.description: Step produces a report or data output for oversight purposes.

information.label: Information
information.description: Step captures, stores, or transmits information only.

relationships._description: Valid inter-node relationship types in a process blueprint.

sequence.label: Sequence
sequence.description: Standard flow from one step to the next.

dependency.label: Dependency
dependency.description: Step B cannot begin until Step A is complete.

loopback.label: Loopback
loopback.description: Flow returns to an earlier step under defined conditions.

handoff.label: Handoff
handoff.description: Transfer of process ownership across roles or systems.

exception.label: Exception Path
exception.description: Alternate flow triggered by an error, failure, or out-of-tolerance condition.

defaults._description: System-wide defaults applied when a field is not explicitly set.

inferenceRules._description: Rule hints consumed by CORTEX and ARCŌ for evaluation and suggestion. Not executable code — logical declarations only.

cortex.label: Missing Accountable on Control
cortex.condition: nodeType IN [control, ccp, compliance] AND raci.A IS NULL
cortex.message: Every control, CCP, or compliance step must have a single Accountable role defined.

cortex.label: CCP Missing Threshold
cortex.condition: nodeType = ccp AND threshold IS NULL
cortex.message: Critical Control Points must define a measurable threshold.

cortex.label: CCP Missing Corrective Action
cortex.condition: nodeType = ccp AND correctiveAction IS NULL
cortex.message: Critical Control Points must define a corrective action for threshold breach.

cortex.label: SoD Risk — Same R and A on Control
cortex.condition: nodeType IN [control, ccp] AND raci.R = raci.A
cortex.message: Responsible and Accountable are the same role on a control step. Segregation of duties risk.

cortex.label: Regulatory Classification Missing Framework
cortex.condition: classification CONTAINS compliance-regulatory AND frameworkReference IS NULL
cortex.message: Steps classified as regulatory compliance must reference the applicable framework.

cortex.label: Monitoring Flag Missing on Control
cortex.condition: nodeType IN [control, ccp] AND monitoring = false
cortex.message: Control and CCP steps should have monitoring enabled.

cortex.label: Process Has No Control Steps
cortex.message: Process has no control or CCP steps defined. Risk coverage is absent.

cortex.label: Decision Step Has Fewer Than Two Branches
cortex.message: Decision steps must have at least two labelled outcome branches.

cortex.label: Loopback Missing Exit Condition
cortex.condition: relationshipType = loopback AND exitCondition IS NULL
cortex.message: Loopback paths must define a condition to exit the loop.

cortex.label: Misclassified Step Type
cortex.condition: nodeType = process AND (threshold IS NOT NULL OR correctiveAction IS NOT NULL)
cortex.message: Step has CCP-level attributes but is typed as a standard process step. Consider reclassifying as CCP or control.

cortex.label: No Process Exists
cortex.message: No process steps found. Health evaluation is not applicable.

cortex.label: SMART Flag Missing on CCP
cortex.message: Critical Control Points should have SMART (Self Monitoring and Reporting) enabled.

arco.label: Intake Step Classification Hint
arco.description: When a user describes a step involving checking, verifying, approving, or authorising — suggest control or ccp type.

arco.label: Intake RACI Prompt
arco.description: If a step is extracted and no Accountable is stated, ARCŌ must ask who owns the outcome of this step.

arco.label: Threshold Prompt for CCP
arco.description: If a step is classified as CCP, ARCŌ must ask for the threshold value and corrective action before finalising.

arco.label: Loopback Detection
arco.description: If a user describes a rework, retry, or rejection flow, flag as loopback and ask for exit condition.

arco.label: SoD Advisory
arco.description: If R and A are the same role on a control step, ARCŌ should note the SoD consideration without blocking.

arco.label: Framework Reference Prompt
arco.description: If a step is classified as regulatory compliance, ARCŌ should ask which framework or obligation it relates to.

layerFilters._description: Named filter presets for PROMAP layer toggle feature (N05). Each filter defines which nodeTypes and classifications are visible.

hierarchy._description: Process level definitions. Flexible — unlimited nesting. L1–L8 as guidance only.

aiProviderAbstraction._description: Structural hook for AI provider swap (P01 — parked V3+). ARCŌ calls this interface only, never the provider directly.
aiProviderAbstraction.note: Replace provider key and endpoint here to migrate ARCŌ to a self-hosted or alternative model. No changes to ARCŌ logic required.
